_doc: Governance-provider USAGE PRICING. All amounts are exact-decimal STRINGS (never JSON floats — Money refuses a float, that is the float-ban at the type boundary). Rates are per 1000 tokens; tool_fees keyed by 'skill' or 'skill/perk' (the skill's pay route / MCP-call / paid-API passthrough); marketplace_fee_pct is applied to the subtotal. The gov provider owns this file; a skill MAY also declare a `price` in its perk metadata.json (used when no fee is set here).

credit_prices._doc: NEGOTIABLE per-run CREDIT price (the internal per-actor budget unit — a different axis from the USD tool_fees above; no dollars per run). Exact-decimal STRINGS (float-banned). The operator OVERRIDES here, keyed 'skill/perk' > 'skill' > 'namespace' (canonical id, then bare leaf); a SKILL may also declare `credit_price` in its perk metadata.json (used when no override is set); `_default` covers the rest.

rails._doc: How the platform tax is COLLECTED at settle (not by an agent call, not a hidden portal). 'default' picks the rail; the tax is the transparent itemized split above. StripeRail is inert until 'stripe.key_file' points at the OPERATOR's key (server-side; the agent never sees it).
